data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for inspector re-verification and sign-off.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Inspector re-verification and sign-off', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case outlines the process but does not provide concrete evidence of implementation or validation of the requirement. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for inspector re-verification and sign-off.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the inspector re-verification and sign-off requirement.
